name: Batzaria Salata (Beet Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Select fresh tender beets and cut off the tops and roots.
2. Wash the beets without removing the skins and boil in a large pot with ample water.
3. Meanwhile, clean the beet greens with the stems; add to the pot after the beets have cooked for 30 minutes.
4. When the beets are tender, remove and strain the liquid.
5. Peel the beets and cut them into round slices; chop up the greens.
6. Mound the greens in the center of a platter and surround them with the beet slices.
7. Pour oil and vinegar over all, and serve. Alternatively, serve with Skordalia (garlic) Sauce.
8. Serve hot or cold.
SKORDALIA SAUCE:
1. Clean garlic and mash it completely using a food processor or pestle.
2. Mash the potatoes one by one until you have a thick paste. The more potatoes used, the thicker the sauce will be, but the potency may decrease.
3. Alternately add oil and vinegar, beating constantly.
4. If the sauce is too thick for your taste, add a little water or stock (such as fish or chicken).
5. NOTE: Many people like to add almonds or walnuts to skordalia. These are mashed to a pulp and added to the paste before the potatoes, oil, and vinegar.
